title: apollo THE HOUSEWARES BRAND Cotton Napkin Set 4, Hand-made 100% Cotton, Washable and Reusable Table Dinner Napkins for Hotel, Lunch, Restaurants, Weddings, Events and Parties, Cream
features: STYLISH YET PRACTICAL: Elevate your dining experience with these cotton napkins from Apollo Housewares. Made from high-quality cotton, these napkins are designed to add a touch of elegance to any table setting. With their soft and absorbent texture, these napkins are perfect for wiping your hands and mouth during meals or for use as placemats to protect your table from spills and stains

HAND-MADE MATERIAL: This product is hand-made from premium 100% cotton fabric, carefully selected for its softness, durability, and luxurious feel. Unlike synthetic materials, our cotton fabric is natural, breathable, absorbent and built to last. Experience the comfort and quality of our hand-made cotton products, available in various colours.
EASY TO CLEAN: Machine-washable per instructions on the tag, resists wrinkles and shrinkage. Tumble-drying is not recommended.
This product is made in India.
